decisive_finding: With the grep anchor removed, md IS adopted (3/3, the confound is gone) — but md billed +5.2%, NOT a win. The C-LF-01 search edge (-21.3%) does NOT replicate. md adoption BACKFIRES: the agent calls  3-7x on the deep nested tree (run1: outline x7 -> 209k tokens) AND still greps. md adds exploration cost rather than replacing it.
conclusion: The large-file md edge STRADDLES ZERO across clean cells (-21.3% / +5.2%) with high variance -> NOT established. This is the FALSIFICATION: md has no robust frontier cost edge vs native Edit at the Sonnet-4.6 frontier, even in its most plausible regime.
